holdings.infoBox: PLTU is an equity ETF with a total of 12 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily PLTR Bull 2X ETF (PLTU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Palantir Technologies Stock. PLTU was launched on Dec 11, 2024 and is issued by Direxion.
